placements.overview:
International School of Design, Dehradun is an institute in Dehradun, Uttarakhand. At the UG, PG and Certificate levels, the institute offers 51 courses across 7 specialisations in Full Time and Part Time modes. The popular International School of Design, Dehradun programs include MBA/PGDM, B.Des, After 10th Diploma, M.Des and PG Diploma. International School of Design, Dehradun courses are provided in several streams including IT & Software, Design, Humanities & Social Sciences, Animation and Beauty & Fitness, etc. The institute has a well-laid infrastructure with multiple facilities.

International School of Design, Dehradun offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as IT & Software, Design and Humanities & Social Sciences. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.Des and UG Diploma. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as MBA/PGDM, M.Des and PG Diploma. International School of Design, Dehradun courses are offered to students in Full Time and Part Time mode.

faqs.question: What is the scope of MBA?
faqs.answer:
The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.
The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.
Some job profiles are listed here:
Brand Manager
Account Manager
International Business Manager
Marketing Executive
Business Technical Consultant
All the best.

highlights.summary: Al-Falah School of Engineering and Technology is a private institute, established in 1997 in Faridabad, Haryana. Al-Falah School of Engineering and Technology is approved by AICTE and offers a total of 29 courses at UG and PG levels in 11 specialisations such as Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Construction Engineering, Electrical Engineering and Electronics & Communication Engineering. Furthermore, it offer courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM in Full Time mode. Al-Falah School of Engineering and Technology fee structure includes a total tuition fee ranging from INR 1,53,000 to 3,05,000. Al-Falah School of Engineering and Technology has an annual seat intake of 888 for all the programmes. It offers courses, in streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. The institute has a safe and well-equipped campus with all the advanced facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It has a strong course curriculum with decent placements in EEE. Overall, it is good.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure and facilities are good. The campus has a green environment. Facilities like labs and a library are fully equipped with air-conditioning. The hostel facility is average, and the food is better than average. Sports are conducted once a year.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Arunai Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure and facilities are good, with a campus surrounded by a green environment. Infrastructure like labs and the library are fully equipped with air conditioning. The hostel facilities are average, and the food is better than average. Sports events are conducted once a year.

reviews.review_heading: Value for money and useful for local students.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities like Wi-Fi, classrooms, library, labs, and restrooms are good and maintained properly. The hostel is nice; it provides medical facilities, a canteen, and sports and games, which are useful to reduce mental stress for hostel students. The food provided by the hostel is of medium quality.

reviews.review_heading: Highly crowded campus with all the facilities.
reviews.review_text: Arunai Engineering College offers a wide range of engineering courses at both the undergraduate and postgraduate levels. Thousands of students graduate from our college each year. The college provides a supportive environment with good water and hostel facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Arunai Engineering College is really the best college.
reviews.review_text: This college's infrastructure facilities are excellent. More comfortable classrooms are available in this college. Hi-tech laboratories are available in this college. This college's hostel facilities are very good, and hygienic food is available in the hostels. More sports ground facilities are available in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Top engineering college in Tiruvannamalai.
reviews.review_text: It's a stress-free environment with spacious classrooms everywhere. This was a very old engineering college in our district, even though it was maintained in good condition till now. There is a green environment everywhere, and our canteen serves high-quality foods.

reviews.review_heading: Like a mini university with various courses.
reviews.review_text: It was a famous and very old college of engineering in our district. The buildings were very constructive here. All the classrooms were very spacious for air-ventilation and some classes were air-conditioned. There is a very big canteen and they are providing high-quality foods.

reviews.review_heading: Arunai engineering college is the best college.
reviews.review_text: Arunai Engineering College's infrastructure is very beautiful. The classrooms are very spacious, and there are more laboratories and library facilities available. Good Wi-Fi network connectivity is provided. There are separate hostels for boys and girls, and 24-hour medical facilities are also available. The mess food is very healthy.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is nice and placements are also good. Teachers help us to do projects.
reviews.review_text: There is a decent hostel life having libraries, physical education and Including a gym. Food is not bad at all. Both vegetarian and non vegetarian are provided. There is a decent menu in hostel mess. Separate hostels for boys and girls are there. Separate wardens are appointed.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good and friendly faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Lab facilities are not good because many instruments are not working. The quality of the food is not good. Classrooms are good. Library facilities are also good. There is Wi-Fi, but phones are not allowed.

reviews.review_heading: Our campus is eco-friendly, and management is good.
reviews.review_text: In the hostel, Wi-Fi and laboratories are good. The mess provides both vegetarian and non-vegetarian food. They also provide snacks and tea for some refreshments in the evening. There will be study hour and respective staffs will come to clarify our doubts. Our campus infrastructure is excellent and eco-friendly.

reviews.review_heading: A college that makes everyone stay forever happy.
reviews.review_text: Have great lab facilities to learn new things and helps us to grow in new technologies conducted. Many workshops and many symposiums and meeting conference on new technologies so that student get knowledge on the subject and very big libraries with lots of collection of books.

reviews.review_heading: We are not satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: The campus is average. The classrooms are average. The hostels are very bad, and the maintenance is very bad. Services are bad. The hostel food is really bad. Most of the students avoid hostel food.

reviews.review_heading: It has good faculty members, but placements should be improved.
reviews.review_text: Arunai Engineering College has the required infrastructure and facilities for the courses available here. The library is good, and it has all kinds of books and students can go there to improve their knowledge. Classrooms and labs are good enough for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Our college should improve placement activities, but the college is good.
reviews.review_text: Labs and classrooms are well-equipped. Our college provides facilities like TV, mess hall and geyser in the hostel. Non-vegetarian food is also provided in the hostel. Quality of the food served is good and hygiene.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied because there is no placement opportunities here.

review_content.Placements: There are only 5-10 students who got placed from this college. There is no opportunity for the students as it's an average college. Those students who are placed have a package of only Rs. 2-3 Lakhs and their role are to be the mechanical engineer and in the call centre in Mahindra.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms, library, labs, sports, games, Wi-Fi campus, parking, buses facility, open ground, a bookshop, Nescafe, Verka, security on gates and such amenities are available on the campus. It is linked to the main road and is easily accessible by the local vehicles. The classrooms here are good, labs are good, but the Wi-Fi lab facility is not good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2013
reviews_list.review_title: It is one of the best colleges for study, fun, and entertainment. The fee is less.

review_content.Placements: In the placement drives of my batch, 40% students were placed for the internship only, because I think there was a less preparation for the interview and students were not serious. And placements are not too good that the students can. One reason is that students are not serious about the job at the time when they are in college.
review_content.Infrastructure: All facilities like Wi-Fi labs and sports are available in the college. The campus is too big. There are two hostels, many buildings and many cafes are present. If we compare with other colleges, this college has more space, with that, they can do many things. There are five playgrounds. There are three parking areas for vehicles. More than 100 employees are there. The college helps the poor students regarding the fee. Many singers come and perform in the events. There is a lot of fun in the events.

review_summary.college_name: Guru Teg Bahadur Khalsa Institute of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Our college is satisfactory for average students.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are good. The students who are capable, get placed in good companies in Delhi NCR, with a package of 2-3 LPA as their initial salary. Though the TPO cell is not very active, the merit students make the companies notice their talent. Thus, they get selected.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is very big. Not only an engineering college but also a polytechnic college is present on the campus. Though the building is quite old, it's nice. The labs are average. Computer PCs are of old versions. Canteens in our college are okay, but they are at a huge distance. The college is far away from the city, so it's difficult for the students to visit the market.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied because of the management.

content.Placements: No placement is provided for my senior batch and our batch as no company visited the college for the last 2 years. A job fair was organised in the past. Students are totally dissatisfied with the placements. Many of the students work in different fields because our college provides very few placements in the past few years.
content.Infrastructure: The college has average infrastructure and sports facilities. No facility or coaches are provided for various games. Students of this college win various tournaments, but our management does not give them any reward or honour. Labs are not in working conditions. Classrooms are average.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied because there is no placement opportunities here.

content.Placements: There are only 5-10 students who got placed from this college. There is no opportunity for the students as it's an average college. Those students who are placed have a package of only Rs. 2-3 Lakhs and their role are to be the mechanical engineer and in the call centre in Mahindra.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms, library, labs, sports, games, Wi-Fi campus, parking, buses facility, open ground, a bookshop, Nescafe, Verka, security on gates and such amenities are available on the campus. It is linked to the main road and is easily accessible by the local vehicles. The classrooms here are good, labs are good, but the Wi-Fi lab facility is not good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2013
individual_reviews.title: It is one of the best colleges for study, fun, and entertainment. The fee is less.

content.Placements: In the placement drives of my batch, 40% students were placed for the internship only, because I think there was a less preparation for the interview and students were not serious. And placements are not too good that the students can. One reason is that students are not serious about the job at the time when they are in college.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities like Wi-Fi labs and sports are available in the college. The campus is too big. There are two hostels, many buildings and many cafes are present. If we compare with other colleges, this college has more space, with that, they can do many things. There are five playgrounds. There are three parking areas for vehicles. More than 100 employees are there. The college helps the poor students regarding the fee. Many singers come and perform in the events. There is a lot of fun in the events.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: Not very satisfied, but it's okay.

content.Placements: The placements are not too good, and it's average. The companies come for IT only. In mechanical engineering, there are no better placements. Earlier it was good when I was in the first year. The companies hire the students approximately in all the streams, but at my time, it was all finished. The sad thing all about that is that the organisation does not do anything about it.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was awesome. Especially the mechanical engineering department, I loved it. The classrooms are satisfactory. There is Wi-Fi available in the campus. The hostel was awesome that time. Wi-Fi, sports facility, security were all available. Overall, it was a great experience about the infrastructure.

Commits college is all about smart classes where you learn from PowerPoint, videos and movies.

reviews.review_heading: The best media college in Bangalore which gives you knowledge and experience that will last forever.
reviews.review_text: The college is well-equipped and has audio-visual labs with the latest gadgets. The library has a huge stock of books. The hostel boasts of big spacious rooms, a kitchen area with micro ovens, toasters and a fridge and a laundry area with washing machine amongst others. The food in the canteen is pure veg and of South Indian cuisine.

reviews.review_heading: Commits has been an awesome experience so far.
reviews.review_text: It is a building situated near the BMTC bus depot in HSR Layout Sector 1. Although the building has a Wi-Fi connection, it is not for the students. Commits have a library, the students studying here should be proud of it. It is well-equipped with the books. The classrooms are big and have an environment, where the students like studying. For the AVCs there are a lot of outdoor projects. A lot of guest lecturers come to take the class. The hostel is just for girls, and it can accommodate 19 girls...

college_info.college_name: Jindal School of Hotel Management, Sigma University

highlights.summary:
Located in Vadodara, JSHM is a premiere hotel management school that is acknowledged as one of the best culinary colleges in Gujarat. The school is promoted by Jamunadevi Educational Trust and was conceived with the objective of offering international quality Hotel and Hospitality Management education in India. JSHM has a partnership with three educational institutes to offer four courses in full-time and part-time mode. The name of these colleges is given below:

The institute follows a Swiss curriculum for its courses and enables the transfer of credits to study and work in Switzerland in their final year. In addition to this, JSHM has signed an articulation agreement with SEG Group to facilitate lateral entry admission for SEG’s degree programmes with easy transfer of credits.

Jindal School of Hotel Management makes teaching and learning process interactive for both the faculty and the students by organising various class activities, practical sessions and lectures. The academic programmes at JSHM are delivered by highly qualified and internationally trained faculty with extensive academic credentials and professional experience. They belong to a fine community of instructors from India and abroad who offer the students their expert knowledge and their passion for the hospitality industry. JSHM also facilitates faculty exchange programmes and invites professional experts to conduct sessions for the teachers, leading to the up-gradation of their skills and knowledge in a truly proactive and creative fashion.

Jindal School of Hotel Management campus is meticulously designed with a training kitchen, air-conditioned and spacious classrooms, fully-equipped hi-tech audio-visual teaching aids, library, clean and affordable accommodation, open-air gymnasium, terrace cafe and indoor games.

Industry Connect is an integral part of JSHM’s activity. The school undertakes consultancy projects and professionally delivers bespoke solutions in various areas of hotel and restaurant operations. With close to 20 experts and partnerships with a multiple vendors, JSHM has both the resources and the expertise to react quickly to client needs. Some of the top clients of JSHM include Olivotel, Banyan Citi, Aum Health Resort, Saladific, Shourya Garh and Rolling Cones.

The major highlights of Jindal School of Hotel Management are tabulated below:

Jindal School of Hotel Management application process is available in online mode through its official website. The institute follows Swiss standards for its courses, therefore it has an international structure of admission intakes as listed below:

The institute conducts an open entrance exam, followed by a Personal Interview round to grant admission to all its courses.

Read more: JSHM Admission Process 2020

Jindal School of Hotel Management offers four courses in partnership with programme-specific organisations. Candidates willing to seek admission in any of Jindal School of Hotel Management courses can go through the details given below:

Hotel & Tourism Management: It is a part-time two-and-a-half-year dual certification programme along with a five-month paid internships. On its successful completion, students are entitled to a diploma degree in Hotel and Restaurant Management recognised by César Ritz Colleges, Switzerland and BBA degree in Hotel & Tourism Management accredited by Dr Baba Saheb Ambedkar Open University, Gujarat.

Hotel Management: It is also a three-year diploma degree, comprising six semesters. It is a full-time programme, offered in collaboration with American Hotel & Lodging Educational Institute (AHLEI), USA. Upon completion of the programme, students can opt for employment or higher studies with the help of JSHM’s training and placement cell.

Hotel & Restaurant Management: It is a two-year part-time diploma degree programme with a Swiss curriculum. The course is recognised by César Ritz Colleges, Switzerland and is spread across six terms of 11 weeks each. At the end of this programme, students can either choose to graduate with Swiss Diploma in India or pursue further studies with Swiss Higher Diploma in Hotel & Restaurant Management with a transferrable credit system.

3-month Food production Craftsman Programme: It is a full-time three-month certificate programme for Class 10 pass-outs. The course is offered in partnership with AHLEI, USA.

Read more: JSHM Courses & Fees

The placement cell of Jindal School of Hotel Management is constantly expanding its network of affiliations with premium hotels internationally to ensure top quality placements and training experience for the students. The school has a record of 100 per cent placement rate till date with 43 per cent of them placed internationally. The institute has three permanent recruiters, including Taj Hotels-Palaces-Resorts-Safaris, Trident Hotels and JW Marriott. Other top companies that participated in Jindal School of Hotel Management placements are listed below:

Read more: JSHM Placements 2020

answer.text: AKRG College of Engineering and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible. Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis. Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana. Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023). There is no upper age limit.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks for BC categories. Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible. Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB. Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream of engineering and technology and secure the above-mentioned minimum percentage (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from AICTE/UGC approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto. Preference will be given to candidates qualified in GATE in the relevant branch based on their test scores and the remaining seats with the candidates qualified in APPGECET as per their merit ranks. Final year student can also apply, provided they have completed the prescribed course and passed all the subjects for the award of degree by the concerned university on or before the date of counselling.UG DiplomaCandidates should have passed S.S.C. Examination (Class 10th) conducted by State Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the Board of Secondary Education, A.P/TS. such as CBSE, ICSE, NIOS, A.P. Open School Society (APOSS), X class examination conducted by various State Boards of Secondary Education in India with Mathematics as one of the subjects, and obtained atleast 35% marks in the qualifying examination. Candidates belonging to NIOS/TOSS/APOSS/CBSE/ICSE/Other Examinations recognised as equivalent to SSC by A.P. Govt. should have passed all the subjects including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, with minimum of 35% marks in each subject. Candidates who appeared or are appearing for SSC or equivalent examination being held in May-2022, and whose results are yet to be declared can also apply. There is no age restriction.

review_summary.college_name: AKRG College of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good infrastructure and facilities, but the management system is not good.

content.Placements: Around 30% to 40% of students are placed. A salary package of 3 LPA to 4 LPA is offered for selected students. Hinduja Global Solutions selected many students. No internships are held by the college. System engineer and many more BPO roles are offered to the students.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides good facilities like water, Wi-Fi, and transport. Our college has spacious classrooms and neat and good washrooms. Our college also has pleasant surroundings and a good environment. Hostel facilities are not good enough, but the college is near the bus stand. College transport is available for surrounding Alka villages. There are medical facilities. The canteen is average.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2013
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied because of no campus placements and faculty.

content.Placements: There are no placements for electrical and electronics engineering branch. BPO jobs are available for every branch. No student got placed through on-campus. There is a placement cell, but no company visited the college for campus interview.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a good computer lab, and the library is useful for many students. Classrooms are good with mike system. There is no medical facility in the college, and the quality of food in the canteen is the worst. Hostel rooms are good, but the food is worst. The college conducts study hours for hostel students. Some equipment for electrical lab is not available in the electrical department.
